# services.hound

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.hound`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| -------------------------------------- | ------------------------------- | ---------------------------------------- |
| `services.hound.databasePath` | `absolute path` | The Hound database path. |
| `services.hound.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable hound. |
| `services.hound.listenAddress` | `string` | Listen address of the Hound daemon. |
| `services.hound.maxConcurrentIndexers` | `positive integer, meaning >0` | Limit the amount of concurrent indexers. |
| `services.hound.package` | `package` | The hound package to use. |
| `services.hound.repositories` | `attribute set of (JSON value)` | The repository configuration. |
